title: Monthly Milestone Baby Blanket, Super Soft Baby Blanket, Personalised Gift for Baby Showers, Unisex (120 x 100 cm)
features: Leave Happy Memories: Watch your baby growing up with our baby milestone blanket. You can capture the best monment of your kid at different ages with camera. Our baby age mat includes words like Days/Weeks/Months/Years, and some decorative frame like cloud/star/heart. Take the cutest photography for your lovely baby without repetition. Share your happiness on social media with friends and family.

Premium Fleece: The high quality fleece milestone blankets are super soft and fluffy. All made by odorless and harmless materials, 100% organic which is safe for newborn baby. The exclusive technology printing pattern on months blanket will never fade. It is machine washable, always keep soft and comfortable.

Multifunctional: This large momthly baby milestones blanket can be used anywhere. Not only for photograph, but also for keeping warm in cold weather. It can be a stroller blanket, baby muslin swaddle wrap, nursing cover and playmat at home. The weight of blanket is 200g, which is light and portable. Always bring a comfortable blanket for your baby when hanging out.

Best Shower Gift: This is one of the best baby shower gift for all expecting mom. The baby milestones blanket with gift wrap design is suitable for all the year, especially for festival like Thanksgiving Day or Christmas. It is small and lightweight in folding size. It will be the best surprise to all moms. The best Christmas gifts for women.

Service Team: Our gift set includes 1x Baby milestone blanket and 4 x Photograph Décor. We are dedicated to give you the best experience with our monthly baby milestone blanket. If there is any question or quality problem, please let us know and we will solve it for you.
description: Product Description Non Fading Printing High Quality Laser printing Non-Toxic Dyes Made from natural thick and warm cotton fiber, super soft and snuggly. Easy Cleaning Dry Quickly Won't Wrinkle after Washing Multiple Uses Besides watch your baby growing up with our baby milestone blanket. It can be used as baby bedding & swaddling blanket.
